Class NotificationRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationRepository
public class NotificationRepository extends Object
Repository for reading and updating entrant notifications.

Handles data operations relating to sending and receiving notifications via Firestore. Supports listening for new notifications, updating unread status, and securely processing entrant invitation responses (accepting or declining) using database transactions.

Relevant user stories:

  • US 01.04.01 Receive notification when chosen from the waiting list
  • US 01.04.02 Receive notification when not chosen from the waiting list
  • US 02.05.03 Draw a replacement applicant (Triggered upon decline)

    Callback interface for listening to real-time notification changes.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationRepository

      public NotificationRepository()
      Initializes the repository with the default Firestore instance.

    • NotificationRepository

      public NotificationRepository(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db)
      Initializes the repository with a provided Firestore instance. Useful for dependency injection during unit testing.
      Parameters:
      db - The Firestore instance to use.

  • Method Details

    • listenForNotifications

      public com.google.firebase.firestore.ListenerRegistration listenForNotifications(String entrantId, NotificationRepository.NotificationListener listener)
      Sets up a real-time listener for an entrant's notifications.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The unique identifier of the entrant.
      listener - The callback to trigger when notifications change.
      Returns:
      A ListenerRegistration object to allow removing the listener later.

    • markAsRead

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> markAsRead(String entrantId, String notificationId)
      Marks a specific notification as read.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The unique identifier of the entrant.
      notificationId - The document ID of the notification.
      Returns:
      A Task representing the asynchronous update operation.

    • acceptInvitation

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> acceptInvitation(String entrantId, NotificationItem item)
      Processes an entrant accepting an event invitation using a Firestore transaction. Validates the current waitlist status, updates it to enrolled, adjusts event counts, and updates the notification state.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The unique identifier of the entrant accepting the invite.
      item - The notification item containing the event details.
      Returns:
      A Task representing the asynchronous transaction operation.

    • declineInvitation

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> declineInvitation(String entrantId, NotificationItem item)
      Processes an entrant declining an event invitation using a Firestore transaction. Validates the status, updates it to declined, adjusts event counts, and subsequently triggers the WaitlistController to draw a replacement applicant.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The unique identifier of the entrant declining the invite.
      item - The notification item containing the event details.
      Returns:
      A Task representing the asynchronous transaction and subsequent redraw operation.

    • getNotificationCollection

      public com.google.firebase.firestore.CollectionReference getNotificationCollection(String entrantId)
      Helper method to get a reference to an entrant's notifications subcollection.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The unique identifier of the entrant.
      Returns:
      The Firestore CollectionReference to the notifications.

    • fromDocument

      public NotificationItem fromDocument(com.google.firebase.firestore.DocumentSnapshot doc)
      Converts a Firestore DocumentSnapshot into a NotificationItem model. Ensures all fields have safe fallback values if missing in the database.
      Parameters:
      doc - The DocumentSnapshot retrieved from Firestore.
      Returns:
      A populated NotificationItem instance.

    • buildSelectedNotificationData

      public static Map<String,Object> buildSelectedNotificationData(String entrantId, String eventId, String eventName)
      Builds a standardized Map containing payload data for a "Selected" notification.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The recipient entrant ID.
      eventId - The event ID.
      eventName - The descriptive name of the event.
      Returns:
      A Map containing the database fields for the notification.

    • buildNotSelectedNotificationData

      public static Map<String,Object> buildNotSelectedNotificationData(String entrantId, String eventId, String eventName)
      Builds a standardized Map containing payload data for a "Not Selected" notification.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The recipient entrant ID.
      eventId - The event ID.
      eventName - The descriptive name of the event.
      Returns:
      A Map containing the database fields for the notification.

    • addSelectedNotificationToBatch

      public static void addSelectedNotificationToBatch(com.google.firebase.firestore.WriteBatch batch, com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String entrantId, String eventId, String eventName)
      Adds a "Selected" notification to an active Firestore WriteBatch. Used heavily by the Lottery algorithm.
      Parameters:
      batch - The active WriteBatch.
      db - The Firestore instance.
      entrantId - The recipient entrant ID.
      eventId - The event ID.
      eventName - The descriptive name of the event.

    • addNotSelectedNotificationToBatch

      public static void addNotSelectedNotificationToBatch(com.google.firebase.firestore.WriteBatch batch, com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String entrantId, String eventId, String eventName)
      Adds a "Not Selected" notification to an active Firestore WriteBatch. Used heavily by the Lottery algorithm.
      Parameters:
      batch - The active WriteBatch.
      db - The Firestore instance.
      entrantId - The recipient entrant ID.
      eventId - The event ID.
      eventName - The descriptive name of the event.
